atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 theme configuration. Use `@theme { ... }` or `@theme inline { ... }` to define design tokens mapped to utilities.

atDirectives.name: @import
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4 entry import, e.g. `@import "tailwindcss";`

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: register additional source paths for class detection.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom utility.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: define a custom variant.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: load a plugin.
